10.evidenceText: No retail prices found in any of the three provided sources
10.extractionRationale: Despite reviewing three sources (bike-discount.de, bike24.com, and schwalbe.com), none contained specific pricing information for the Schwalbe Clik Valve product.

27.evidenceText: Three distinct product page URLs identified: p1993546.html (40mm schwarz), p1993550.html (60mm Kupfer), and p1993551.html (80mm Kupfer). Each represents a unique CoreCap valve product listing.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 on bike24.de. Found 3 distinct listings with different specifications (40mm black, 60mm copper, 80mm copper). Brand listing page and related accessory products excluded.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - gold | 2 Pieces | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: No explicit stock status indicators found in either listing. Content is incomplete, making full stock status determination impossible.
30.extractionRationale: Both product listings (gold and red variants) do not contain any explicit mentions of out-of-stock status, unavailability, or German equivalents. The provided content appears truncated, preventing a complete assessment of stock information sections that typically appear on product pages.

56.evidenceText: The provided sources describe the Clik Valve interface system and show valve products (SKUs 3531 and 3532 are tubeless ventils in 60mm and 80mm lengths), but do not contain information about distinct inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface.
56.extractionRationale: The evidence provided focuses on the Clik Valve as an interface system and lists specific valve products (3531, 3532), not inner tube models. No inner tube SKUs incorporating the Clik valve interface are mentioned in any of the five sources.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum increased to 3676.00 USD/T, the highest since March 2022.
61.extractionRationale: The source directly states the current LME aluminum spot price as 3676.00 USD/T (USD per metric ton). This is the exact figure provided in the evidence.
